creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
AFAIU:
* 13 and 14 are affected.
* 10 and older are not affected.
* Don't know about 11, 12 and -devel.

Patch was commited to src already:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=264394#c4
https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=592e876a422960a78938caa714f2263ff38eb87b
